stemHtml: Which condition is requested so that an aerodrome may be considered controlled?

options.a: The aerodrome shall be located within a Control Zone.
options.b: The aerodrome shall be provided with a Control Tower.
options.c: The aerodrome shall be located within a controlled airspace.
options.d: The aerodrome shall be located within a Control Zone (CTR) and provided with a Control Tower.
